# ServiceTitan Hacks

> AI tools, automation courses, and community for home service contractors using ServiceTitan. Trusted by 10,000+ HVAC, plumbing, and electrical companies.

ServiceTitan Hacks helps contractors get more out of ServiceTitan through AI-powered tools, step-by-step automation courses, curated partner integrations, and a growing community of operators in the trades.

## Key Sections

- Blog: /blog — Practical articles on ServiceTitan, AI, automation, hiring, and business growth for contractors.
- Apps & Tools: /apps — Curated apps and automation tools for ServiceTitan users, including free utilities.
- Courses: /courses — Step-by-step video training on dashboards, forms, Zapier, Make.com, and more.
- Resources: /resources — Free downloadable templates, calculators, SOPs, and guides for home service companies.
- Events & Webinars: /events — Live and on-demand webinars on ServiceTitan, AI, performance pay, and sales.
- Podcast: /podcast — Candid conversations with contractors and founders changing the trades.
- Partners: /partners — Vetted technology partners that integrate with ServiceTitan.
- About: /about — Mission and story behind ServiceTitan Hacks.
- Contact: /contact — Reach the team.

## Tools & Calculators

- Pricebook Overhaul Tool: /pricebook-overhaul-tool — AI rewrites ServiceTitan pricebook descriptions in homeowner-friendly language.
- Pricebook Overhaul Service: /pricebook-overhaul — Done-for-you pricebook rewrite service.
- SmartAC ROI Calculator: /smartac-roi-calculator — Estimate truck roll savings and membership revenue from remote HVAC monitoring.
- Wink ROI Calculator: /wink-roi-calculator — Calculate invoicing automation savings with Wink Toolbox.
- Hiring ROI Calculator: /hiring-roi-calculator — True cost of an unfilled technician role.
- Truck Roll Cost Calculator: /truck-roll-calculator — True cost per truck roll for HVAC companies.

## Courses

- Dashboard Course: /dashboard-course
- Fix Ugly Forms Course: /fix-ugly-forms-course
- Company App Course: /company-app-course
- Make Integration Course: /make-integration-course
- Zapier Integration Course: /zapier-integration-course
- Job Summary Cleaner Course: /job-summary-course
- All-Access Pass: /all-access

## Partners

- Wink Toolbox: /partners/wink-toolbox — Back-office automation and reporting for ServiceTitan.
- SmartAC: /partners/smartac — Remote HVAC monitoring to reduce truck rolls.
- Contractor Commerce: /partners/contractor-commerce — Online HVAC equipment pricing and sales.
- Broccoli AI: /partners/broccoli-ai — AI CSR that answers calls and books jobs.
- PhoneTap: /partners/phonetap — Call analytics and CSR performance for ServiceTitan.
- ShareWillow: /partners/sharewillow — Performance pay software for ServiceTitan teams.
- LiveSwitch: /partners/liveswitch — Virtual phone solutions for home service businesses.
- Polycam: /partners/polycam — 3D scanning for property documentation.
- Service Crucible: /partners/service-crucible — Growth systems for HVAC, plumbing, and electrical.
- DataTurk: /partners/dataturk — AI funnel analytics from call center to close.

## Services

- ServiceTitan Automation Services: /servicetitan-automation-services — Done-for-you Zapier, Make.com, and AI automations for ServiceTitan shops.
- Sponsorship & Partnership: /sponsor — Reach 10,000+ verified ServiceTitan contractors.

## Founder

- Bill Brown: /bill — Founder. Former Inc. 5000 HVAC company owner, ServiceTitan power user, and community builder.
